description: Install and configure the Claude Code CLI in your workspace.

variables.name: agent_id
variables.description: The ID of a Coder agent.

variables.name: anthropic_api_key
variables.description: API key passed to Claude Code via the ANTHROPIC_API_KEY env var.

variables.name: claude_binary_path
variables.description: Directory where the Claude Code binary is located. Use this if Claude is pre-installed or installed outside the module to a non-default location.

variables.name: claude_code_oauth_token
variables.description: OAuth token passed to Claude Code via the CLAUDE_CODE_OAUTH_TOKEN env var. Generate one with `claude setup-token`.

variables.name: claude_code_version
variables.description: The version of Claude Code to install.

variables.name: disable_autoupdater
variables.description: Disable Claude Code automatic updates. When true, Claude Code will stay on the installed version.

variables.name: enable_ai_gateway
variables.description: Use AI Gateway for Claude Code. https://coder.com/docs/ai-coder/ai-gateway

variables.name: icon
variables.description: The icon to use for the app.

variables.name: mcp
variables.description: JSON-encoded string of MCP server configurations. When set, servers are added at Claude Code's user scope so they are available across every project the workspace owner opens.

variables.name: model
variables.description: Sets the default model for Claude Code via ANTHROPIC_MODEL env var. If empty, Claude Code uses its default. Supports aliases (sonnet, opus) or full model names.

variables.name: post_install_script
variables.description: Custom script to run after installing Claude Code.

variables.name: pre_install_script
variables.description: Custom script to run before installing Claude Code. Can be used for dependency ordering between modules (e.g., waiting for git-clone to complete before Claude Code initialization).

variables.name: workdir
variables.description: Optional project directory. When set, the module pre-creates it if missing and pre-accepts the Claude Code trust/onboarding prompt for it in ~/.claude.json.
